translit: oleiynu leshabeicha laadon hakol loseis gedulo leyotzeir bereishis shelo osonu kegoyeiy hoarotzos velo somonu kemishpchos hoadomo shelo som chelkeinu kohem vegoroleinu kechol hamonom: sheheim mishtachavim lohevel vorik vmispallim el eil lo yoshia, vaanachnu korim vmishtachavim vmodim lifneiy melech malcheiy hamlochim hakodosh boruch , shehu note shomayim veyoseid oretz, vmoshav yekoro bashomayim mimaal, vshchinas uzo begovheiy meromim,  eloheiynu eiyn od, emes malkeinu efes zuloso kakosuv besoroso veyodato hayom vahasheivoso el levovecho ki Adonoy  hoelohim bashomayim mimaal veal hooretz mitochas eiyn od:

al kein nekave lecho Adonoy eloheiynu liros meheiro besiferes uzecho lehaavir gilulim min hooretz vehoelilim koros yikoreisun lesakein olom bemalchus shaday vechol beneiy vosor yikru vishmecho, lehafnos eileycho kol risheiy oretz, yakiru veyeidu kol yoshveiy seiveil ki lecho sichra kol berech tishova kol loshon: lefoneycho Adonoy eloheiynu yichru veyipolu, velichvod shimcho yekor yiteinu, vikablu chulom es ol malchusecho, vesimloch aleiyhem meheiro leolom voed, ki hamalchus shelcho hi vlolmeiy ad timloch bechovod, kakosuv besorosecho Adonoy yimloch leolom voed: veneemar vehoyo Adonoy lemelech al kol hooretz bayom hahu yihye Adonoy echod vshmo echod:
